creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 181435
Relevant parts of the build log showing the problem

The latest update to py-Jinja2 removed 2to3 conversion of examples and now Python 2 based examples are failing at the post-build compilation stage.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/py-Jinja2/Makefile?r1=437424&r2=437423&pathrev=437424

Recommend return of 2to3 conversion of examples.

Also recommend making examples optional.
